text.title: Risk Register Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Identifying risks once at kickoff and never updating the register.
antipattern.root-cause: Static registers go stale within weeks.
antipattern.fix: Weekly review ritual; flag stale registers in dashboard.

antipattern.symptom: Using 'Communication breakdown' as a risk in every register.
antipattern.root-cause: Generic LLM-default risks are not project-specific; they add noise.
antipattern.fix: Reject risks without a quoted project-specific source.

antipattern.symptom: Scoring more than 70% of risks as Medium/Medium (3/3).
antipattern.fix: Force a roughly normal distribution across the 5x5 matrix.
